title: Catears on armor
body:
# Adds Catears to all armor types
 ![Player swiching between different helmets ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H0jcZ1ZU/images/ff4e54686c630511664e78d5eeec44249986b11a.gif)
---
**The resourcepack adds Carears to the actual items and to the armor models.**


<details>
<summary>Renaming</summary>


 **This version doesnt support renaming**, because vanilla minecraft does not have this functionality.


> You can use the [**version that supports renamnig**.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/catears-on-armor-cit-resewn-version 'Title')This will show the new catears only on renamed Helmets.







</details>
